steps.description: Add nullable warned_50pct_at TIMESTAMPTZ column to step_runs via Alembic; update StepRun model with matching mapped column
Review S01 schema migration + model update for correctness, reversibility, and naming conventions

Add QV_GATE_TIMEOUT_DEFAULTS dict + per-gate lookup in get_timeout (depends on CR-00023's gate column); update get_timeout signature with optional step kwarg; update batch_manager.py and fix_cycle.py callers; emit one-time step_warning_50pct DaemonEvent in _check_step_health; register the new event_type in dashboard/routers/sse.py
Review S03 daemon changes: per-gate dict, get_timeout resolution chain, 50%-warn idempotency contract, sse registry update

Surface last_heartbeat age (rendered as 'Xs ago') and pid_alive indicator pip on the running-tasks, worktrees, and jobs tables; touch RunningRow dataclass + running_table.html / step_row.html / jobs_table.html fragments
Review S05 dashboard changes for accessibility, no-regression of existing columns, and correctness of the heartbeat-age formatting
Cross-step global review of S01/S03/S05 — verify schema → daemon emission → SSE registry → dashboard rendering chain holds end-to-end

Unit tests for get_timeout per-gate lookup; unit tests for 50%-warn idempotency and timeout shadowing; integration test for full step-monitor lifecycle (launch → past 50% → assert single warning event); regression test for legacy NULL-gate rows
Review S08 tests for semantic correctness and coverage of the 7 acceptance criteria
QV: Browser verification — heartbeat age + pid-alive indicator render on /system/running and /system/worktrees, no console errors, no regression in existing columns
